subcodes.first_line: O Amín-i-'Abdu'l-Bahá! Thy letters from 'Ishqábád and Bákú have all been received, concerning the conduct of affairs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین عبدالبهاء نامه های شما از عشق آباد و بادکوبه جمیع رسید از تمشیت امور
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
